name: Almond Truffle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers, ground almonds, 1/4 cup sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Stir until well combined.
2. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add the remaining 1 1/2 cups sugar and cocoa, beating until smooth. Add the melted bittersweet chocolate and mix well.
4. Add the eggs, amaretto, and whipping cream to the mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake at 350°F for 60-65 minutes or until set in the center.
6. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely before proceeding.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
8. To serve, remove the sides of the pan and place the cheesecake on a serving plate. Drizzle 3 ounces of melted chocolate over the top. Dip half of each whole almond in the remaining melted chocolate and arrange them on the cheesecake.
